title: Watercolor Travel Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt:
Theme: Sanssouci Palace travel journal illustration.
Subject: Sanssouci Palace in Potsdam, Germany, seen from a graceful pedestrian path leading through terraced gardens toward the rococo palace facade.
Scene: warm late-afternoon light, quiet European garden atmosphere, trimmed hedges, stone steps, fountains, a few tiny distant visitors for scale, airy sky and generous paper-white space.
Composition: vertical art print, street-sketch perspective, palace placed slightly right of center, path and garden lines leading the eye inward, large clean whitespace in the upper-left corner for handwritten title text.
Typography: add a small elegant handwritten cursive title in the upper-left whitespace: "Sanssouci". Add one very tiny thin subtitle line below it: "Potsdam, Germany". The lettering should look like warm sepia ink written in a travel sketchbook, subtle and delicate, not a poster headline.
Style: watercolor and fine ink urban sketch, loose architectural linework, translucent washes, visible cotton paper texture, refined travel journal aesthetic, elegant but spontaneous hand-drawn feeling.
Color palette: cream paper, warm ochre stone, muted garden green, pale blue-gray sky, soft sepia ink, light golden shadows.
Restrictions: no bold block typography, no bottom title banner, no commercial postcard layout, no photorealism, no 3D render, no heavy saturation, no logo, no watermark, no extra text.
imagePrompts.title: Sanssouci Travel Journal Illustration

imagePrompts.prompt:
Theme: Paris travel journal illustration.
Subject: Eiffel Tower viewed from a quiet Seine-side street corner in Paris, with Haussmann buildings, cafe awnings, trees, and a few tiny pedestrians creating scale.
Scene: soft spring morning light, gentle city haze, riverside atmosphere, warm cafe details, elegant Parisian street rhythm without tourist crowding.
Composition: vertical art print, urban sketch perspective from street level, Eiffel Tower rising in the background between buildings, foreground cafe and river edge creating depth, large clean whitespace in the upper-left corner for handwritten title text.
Typography: add a small elegant handwritten cursive title in the upper-left whitespace: "Paris". Add one very tiny thin subtitle line below it: "La Seine, France". The lettering should look like warm sepia ink written in a travel sketchbook, subtle and delicate, not a poster headline.
Style: watercolor and fine ink urban sketch, loose architectural linework, translucent washes, visible cotton paper texture, refined travel journal aesthetic, elegant but spontaneous hand-drawn feeling.
Color palette: cream paper, pale blue sky, muted rose rooftops, soft gray ironwork, cafe gold, gentle green trees, warm sepia ink.
Restrictions: no bold block typography, no bottom title banner, no commercial postcard layout, no photorealism, no 3D render, no heavy saturation, no logo, no watermark, no extra text.
imagePrompts.title: Paris Travel Journal Illustration

imagePrompts.prompt:
Theme: London travel journal illustration.
Subject: Tower Bridge in London viewed from a lively but uncrowded riverside street, with the Thames, historic stone details, a small red double-decker bus accent, and wet pavement reflections.
Scene: soft overcast London afternoon after light rain, muted blue-gray sky, warm window lights, elegant riverside architecture, calm pedestrians at small scale.
Composition: vertical art print, urban sketch perspective from street level, Tower Bridge framed by buildings and river railings, diagonal street and river lines creating depth, large clean whitespace in the upper-left corner for handwritten title text.
Typography: add a small elegant handwritten cursive title in the upper-left whitespace: "London". Add one very tiny thin subtitle line below it: "Tower Bridge". The lettering should look like warm sepia ink written in a travel sketchbook, subtle and delicate, not a poster headline.
Style: watercolor and fine ink urban sketch, loose architectural linework, translucent washes, visible cotton paper texture, refined travel journal aesthetic, elegant but spontaneous hand-drawn feeling.
Color palette: cream paper, misty blue-gray sky, muted stone, restrained red bus accent, amber street reflections, warm sepia ink.
Restrictions: no bold block typography, no bottom title banner, no commercial postcard layout, no photorealism, no 3D render, no heavy saturation, no logo, no watermark, no extra text, do not confuse Tower Bridge with London Bridge.
imagePrompts.title: London Travel Journal Illustration

imagePrompts.prompt:
Theme: Bavaria travel journal illustration.
Subject: Neuschwanstein Castle in Bavaria, Germany, seen from a winding alpine footpath with pine trees, wildflowers, and distant mountain mist.
Scene: pale morning light, romantic Bavarian landscape, soft clouds, forested slopes, a quiet path leading toward the castle, a few tiny distant travelers for scale.
Composition: vertical art print, travel sketch perspective, castle placed slightly right of center and above the midline, foreground path and trees creating depth, large clean whitespace in the upper-left corner for handwritten title text.
Typography: add a small elegant handwritten cursive title in the upper-left whitespace: "Bavaria". Add one very tiny thin subtitle line below it: "Neuschwanstein". The lettering should look like warm sepia ink written in a travel sketchbook, subtle and delicate, not a poster headline.
Style: watercolor and fine ink urban sketch with light landscape painting, loose architectural linework, translucent washes, visible cotton paper texture, refined travel journal aesthetic, elegant but spontaneous hand-drawn feeling.
Color palette: cream paper, pale blue mist, pine green, warm stone highlights, muted lavender mountain shadows, soft sepia ink.
Restrictions: no bold block typography, no bottom title banner, no commercial postcard layout, no fantasy castle redesign, no photorealism, no 3D render, no heavy saturation, no logo, no watermark, no extra text.
imagePrompts.title: Bavaria Travel Journal Illustration
